findings.description: `setFormatter` is a key `SendingMessage` API method called in every code example (Patterns 1–4) but is absent from s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code samples for all 4 patterns include `.setFormatter(formatter)` as part of the SendingMessage builder chain.

findings.description: `JndiHelper` (class name) and `jndiHelper` (property name) are absent from s3's hints, despite appearing in the repository initialization XML example for the JMS provider.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML shows `<property name="jndiHelper"><component class="nablarch.core.repository.jndi.JndiHelper">` as part of the JndiLookingUpJmsMessagingProvider configuration.

findings.description: The automated pre-check warning 'Section count 4 < source headings 7' is a false positive. The source contains exactly 4 RST headings (2 `===` level and 2 `---` level). The 4 bold-formatted pattern labels (`**1. 応答不要メッセージ送信**` etc.) are not RST headings and should not be counted. The knowledge file's 4 sections correctly match the 4 actual headings.
